title: make podman play use ENVs from image

comments.body: git commit messages should sign , and should add some test units

@zhangguanzhang : added signed-off.  Yes, I completely agree that the feature could use some unit tests. The breaking change from 2.1 to 2.2 would probably not have happened then. I myself, however, do not understand the test framework sufficiently, so I do not feel confident to do that correctly. I just would like to have `podman play` back to the working state it was in in 2.1.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cruwe*, *giuseppe* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
